Operation 'redirectBizumPayment' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.current_description: Redirect the customer to the Bizum payment gateway using the token obtained from the payment order creation.
data.description_suggestion: Redirects the customer to the Bizum payment gateway for payment authorization. Requires the payment token obtained from the createPaymentOrder operation. This is a redirect operation that initiates the Bizum payment flow. The customer will be redirected to Bizum's authentication and payment confirmation interface. Returns an HTTP redirect response (302/303) to the Bizum payment URL.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks clarity about the operation's mechanics and effects.
